name: DocGo Inc.
business: DocGo provides mobile healthcare services including mobile health, virtual care, and ambulance transportation, using a proprietary technology platform. It sells to municipalities, hospital networks, health insurance providers, and directly to patients. Its services are delivered by a network of clinicians and a fleet of medical response vehicles across all 50 states and the United Kingdom.
namedCustomers: Martin Luther King Jr. Memorial Hospital

exposures.sentence: Our Company DocGo is leading the proactive healthcare revolution. We are democratizing access with our innovative care delivery platform that includes mobile health services, virtual care management and ambulance services.

Our R&D efforts include, among other things, the development of innovative software and services as well as the adoption and responsible integration of AI and ML capabilities across our products and internal operations, including the development, training, validation, deployment, and ongoing monitoring of ML models and related systems.
